minor_notes: The content provides a very clear, accurate, and well-structured introduction to the DevOps workflow and CI/CD lifecycle. All learning objectives are thoroughly covered. The language is professional and idiomatic, and the diagrams are well-placed and effective.

The explanation of CI primarily focusing on catching problems on pull requests before merging to the main branch reflects modern best practices and is appropriate for an introductory course, even if CI historically had a slightly broader definition regarding frequent integration into a shared branch.
